message:
chore: remove unused imports from visualization components (linter cleanup)

Removes unused lucide-react icon imports and unused React hooks flagged by
ESLint/TypeScript unused-imports rule.

bakery-visualizations.tsx:
- Remove unused: Zap, AlertTriangle, Info, Play, Pause, RotateCcw, Users,
  Timer, Cpu, Fingerprint, ChevronRight, ChevronLeft, MousePointer2, Layers
- Remove unused: useCallback hook

bakery-math-tooltip.tsx:
- Remove unused imports

barra-visualizations.tsx:
- Consolidate and remove unused imports

cmaes-visualizations.tsx:
- Remove unused imports

hoeffding-*.tsx:
- Minor import cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
